response.justification: While Sarah Smith has extensive full-stack and distributed-systems experience, her resume lacks direct evidence of leadership in agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or scaling teams to 30+ engineers. Her current role at re:cinq touches AI-agent infrastructure but not in a production, regulated, or commercial fintech context. Her background in event-driven systems and real-time processing is promising but not explicitly aligned with the fintech or agentic AI requirements.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience
Proven ability to work across multiple tech stacks and languages
Experience with high-performance, low-latency systems and microservices
concerns: No explicit experience leading multi-agent AI systems in production or fintech environments
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership
No direct experience with regulated financial systems or compliance infrastructure
